output.input: {"query":"(AI workflow OR automation pipeline OR CI/CD AI OR agent automation OR workflow automation) lang:en","limit":10,"mode":"Top"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
Here are the top recent X posts (sorted by relevance and engagement) matching your query on AI workflows, automation pipelines, CI/CD with AI, agent automation, and workflow automation—all in English. I've pulled the most relevant ones from the last week, focusing on practical examples, tools, and trends:

### Key Highlights:
- **Data Processing & Training Pipelines**: Poseidon describes a multi-stage automated pipeline for filtering high-quality voice data for AI training, combining semantic scoring, language checks, and human validation.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019101692449509698) Cloudinary shows how their "Refiners" maintain quality control in generative AI production pipelines without manual slowdowns.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018338831171281138)
  
- **Sales & Demand Gen Automation**: An AI-enhanced pipeline using tools like Clay, InstantlyAI, HeyReach, HubSpot, and Slack has generated $50M+ in pipeline value by automating enrichment, multi-channel outreach, scripting, and re-engagement loops.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018376206807114045)

- **Client & Project Management Workflows**: monday.com is praised for visualizing client pipelines with boards, automations (e.g., status notifications), Kanban views, and dashboards to track stages like leads to completion.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019023301826212194)

- **AI Agents & Data Science**: A GitHub repo for "AI Data Science Team" builds agents to automate data science workflows and pipelines.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018411112237088892) Discussions also highlight agents for content workflows (e.g., scheduling/monitoring posts) and RAG pipelines using platforms like OpenRouter with N8n.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2017590748129137047)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2017722357377282303)

- **DevOps/CI/CD & Skills Trends**: Multiple posts list high-demand 2026 skills like DevOps automation (CI/CD, IaC, GitOps), AI/ML integration (LLMs, RAG, MLOps), and ETL pipelines as top priorities for cloud engineers.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2018713904533438716)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018654369722544355)

These reflect a surge in AI-driven automation for sales, data, devops, and no-code tools. Common themes: multi-tool integrations (e.g., Zapier, N8n, monday.com), agentic workflows, and quality gates in pipelines. If you want deeper dives (e.g., viewing images/videos from specific posts or Latest mode results), let me know!
